docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF FRED CRIMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIM BIGGERT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRIMI, FRED ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CRIMI, FRED BIGGERT, TIM
